# terrible_community_general_say (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `msg` (String) What to say.

### Optional

- `voice` (String) What voice to use.
